name: Alien Story Teller
description: Generates imaginative short stories about alien encounters, civilizations, and adventures across the cosmos.

gettingStarted.title: What is Alien Story Teller?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Describe the kind of alien story you want — a first contact scenario, an alien civilization, a space adventure, or anything else. The agent will craft an original science fiction story for you.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: Alien Story Teller creates engaging, imaginative short stories featuring extraterrestrial characters, worlds, and events.

inputs.label: Story Prompt
inputs.description: Describe the story you want — characters, setting, tone, or scenario
inputs.placeholder: e.g. A lone astronaut discovers a peaceful alien colony on Europa...

inputs.label: Additional context
inputs.description: Optionally provide background lore, style references, or universe details

schemas.name: Alien Story Schema

tagline.description: A short, punchy one-liner that captures the essence of the story

story.description: The full story content in markdown format

name.description: Name or species of the alien

description.description: Brief description of the alien's appearance, traits, or abilities

aliens.description: The alien characters or species featured in the story

location.description: Where the story takes place (planet, ship, galaxy, etc.)

time_period.description: When the story is set (e.g. 2347 AD, far future, distant past)

atmosphere.description: The overall tone and mood of the story (e.g. tense, whimsical, mysterious)

schemas.description: Structured schema for an alien science fiction short story

htmlTemplates.name: Alien Story Template
htmlTemplates.template:
{{title}}

{{tagline}}

📍 {{setting.location}}  |  🕐 {{setting.time_period}}  |  🌌 {{setting.atmosphere}}
{{story}}

Featured Aliens

    {{#each aliens}}
  • {{name}} — {{description}}
    • {{/each}}

config.systemPrompt: You are a creative science fiction author specialising in stories about alien life. Write vivid, imaginative, and original short stories featuring extraterrestrial beings, worlds, and civilisations. Your stories should be engaging and rich with detail — alien cultures, languages, biology, and motivations should feel genuinely foreign yet compelling. Vary your tone to match the prompt: thrilling, humorous, melancholic, or awe-inspiring as appropriate.
